3246720.name: Breachers - Adrenaline Bundle
3246720.description:
Get ready to fuel your game with the Adrenaline Skin Bundle, and give your firearms a sporty competitive edge!

Deck out your gear with sleek, high-energy designs inspired by extreme sports and intense competition. Bring speed, style, and a winning edge to every match—gear up, and dominate! These skins feature energetic purple muzzle flashes, sounds with a sci-fi edge, and smooth polished designs.

This bundle includes:

  • Deluxe Jesper "Adrenaline" Weapon Skin

  • Deluxe RCP "Adrenaline" Weapon Skin

  • Deluxe Urakan "Adrenaline" Weapon Skin

  • Deluxe Cadillo "Adrenaline" Weapon Skin

  • Deluxe Marui "Adrenaline" Weapon Skin

This bundle contains add-on content in the form of in-game items, and requires the base app Breachers. (Sold Separately)
3246720.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 荷兰语, 芬兰语, 日语, 韩语, 挪威语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典语, 繁体中文, 土耳其语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
